name: Odunayo Abraham
title: DevOps Engineer & Software Developer
tagline: Bridging low-level systems, high-performance backends, and modern web architecture.
about:
Software engineer and DevOps specialist focused on systems-level engineering, high-performance backends, and production Kubernetes infrastructure.

I've shipped custom Android OS builds (StatixOS, helluvaOS), built polyglot microservices in Rust and Java, and deployed production workloads on K3s with automated CI/CD pipelines. My strongest work bridges the gap between low-level systems programming and modern cloud-native architecture.

highlights.label: Systems & OS
highlights.detail: Custom AOSP ROMs, Linux kernel workflows

highlights.label: Cloud & DevOps
highlights.detail: K3s, Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Trivy

highlights.label: Backend
highlights.detail: Rust (Axum), Java (Spring Boot), rate limiting, OAuth

experience.description: Engineered cross-platform solutions utilizing Flutter and Rust.
Maintained custom ROMs for Pixel devices, resolving device-specific bugs and merging monthly AOSP security patches.
Instructing students on basic and core networking fundamentals and infrastructure.

projects.title: Flutter & Rust Octernship
projects.description: Cross-platform application built with a native Flutter UI and a high-performance Rust backend core.

projects.title: DevOps Control Center
projects.description: A centralized dashboard for infrastructure management and automation workflows.

projects.title: Polyglot Microservice Portfolio
projects.description: A full-stack monorepo bridging a hot-reloading React frontend with live Rust and Spring Boot API engines.
